_note: Golden eval set for the learning chatbot (learning_chat_v1), RAGAS-aligned. Each case carries: user_question + the user's gap/plan context + retrieved_resources (what the retriever returned) + gold_resource_ids (the IDEAL resources for the query, independent of retrieval — drives context_recall) + expected_cited_resource_ids (what a correct answer should cite GIVEN the retrieved set; [] = honest empty / clarify) + expected_behavior. INVARIANT: expected_cited ⊆ retrieved. context_recall = |gold ∩ retrieved|/|gold|. No LLM needed for the skeleton (eval:learning); the real ChatService.turn output plugs into scoreLearningCase once RAG-PR2 ships. 30 cases (RAGAS: >=30 directional). AI-architect calibrates/extends.

cases.user_question: Tôi thiếu React thì nên học gì?
cases.expected_behavior: Recommend + cite r-react-fund, tie to the missing React gap; scaffold a starting point.

cases.user_question: Có tài liệu React ngắn hơn khóa dài không?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite the shorter official doc r-react-doc-short.

cases.user_question: Gap React của tôi liên quan tới JD frontend thế nào?
cases.expected_behavior: Explain React is a required JD skill the CV is missing, cite r-react-fund.

cases.user_question: Tôi nên học React Native không?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-react-native, tie to mobile role.

cases.user_question: Tại sao tôi phải học Docker?
cases.expected_behavior: Explain why Docker matters for the backend JD, cite r-docker-course.

cases.user_question: Học xong Docker thì tôi phải nộp proof gì?
cases.expected_behavior: Restate proof_of_completion (deploy a container) for r-docker-course.

cases.user_question: Tài liệu Docker nào miễn phí?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite the free resource r-docker-free.

cases.user_question: Tôi cần cải thiện tiếng Anh phỏng vấn
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-english-interview for interview English.

cases.user_question: Học tiếng Anh chuyên ngành IT ở đâu?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-english-it.

cases.user_question: Viết email tiếng Anh chuyên nghiệp thế nào?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-english-writing.

cases.user_question: Tôi muốn luyện phỏng vấn React
cases.expected_behavior: Cite the interview drill r-drill-react.

cases.user_question: Luyện câu hỏi behavioral (STAR) thế nào?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-drill-star.

cases.user_question: Ôn system design cho phỏng vấn senior?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-drill-sysdesign.

cases.user_question: Sửa CV bullet cho React thế nào?

retrieved_resources.title: Rewrite a React bullet with evidence

cases.expected_behavior: Cite cv_fix_task r-cvfix-react.

cases.user_question: CV của tôi thiếu bằng chứng Docker, sửa sao?

retrieved_resources.title: Add evidence to a skill claim

cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-cvfix-evidence.

cases.user_question: Làm sao định lượng kết quả trong CV?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-cvfix-quantify.

cases.user_question: Còn 2 ngày, tôi học Docker kịp không?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-docker-crash AND be honest: 2 days = crash-prep, not deep mastery.

cases.user_question: Còn 3 ngày, học AWS sâu được không?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-aws-crash; honest that 3 days only covers basics.

cases.user_question: 1 tuần ôn React cho phỏng vấn, lộ trình gấp?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-react-crash; frame as focused crash-prep for 7 days.

cases.user_question: Tôi thiếu COBOL thì học gì?
cases.expected_behavior: Honest empty-state: no curated COBOL resource yet; point to the roadmap; do NOT invent one.

cases.user_question: Có khóa nào về Fortran không?
cases.expected_behavior: Honest empty-state; no fabricated course.

cases.user_question: Học ZK-proof cryptography ở đâu?
cases.expected_behavior: Honest empty-state; no fabricated resource.

cases.user_question: Tôi thiếu Rust thì học gì?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-rust-pending but flag it's a lower-confidence (pending) suggestion.

cases.user_question: Học Elixir ở đâu?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-elixir-pending; note lower confidence.

cases.user_question: Tài liệu Scala nào tốt?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite r-scala-pending; note lower confidence.

cases.user_question: Tôi muốn học Kubernetes
cases.expected_behavior: Retriever surfaced only Docker (not Kubernetes) → context_recall=0. Bot must NOT cite the irrelevant Docker; honest empty-state for Kubernetes.

cases.user_question: GraphQL học từ đâu?
cases.expected_behavior: Only an irrelevant REST resource retrieved → recall=0. Do NOT cite it; honest empty-state.

cases.user_question: Tôi cần học testing
cases.expected_behavior: Partial recall (0.5): only unit-testing retrieved, e2e missing. Cite what is available (r-unit-test).

cases.user_question: Làm sao để tôi giỏi backend?
cases.expected_behavior: Question too broad → ask ONE clarifying question (which area: API, DB, infra?) instead of dumping the broad resource. Do NOT cite yet.

cases.user_question: Tôi muốn học lập trình
cases.expected_behavior: Far too broad + nothing retrieved → clarify (what role/goal?) before recommending; no fabricated resource.
